lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has extensive body damage and rust. The interior is heavily worn with torn upholstery. The engine requires significant repairs and currently runs inconsistently.
This car is in good condition.

This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor cosmetic imperfections. The interior is clean with light signs of use on the upholstery. Mechanically, the car is reliable and has been well-maintained.

Step into a true showroom-quality gem! This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, looking and driving just like the day it rolled off the assembly line. It has been meticulously preserved with flawless paint and a pristine interior. You won't find a better-maintained example than this!

This vehicle is in fair condition and would be a solid choice for someone looking for a dependable driver that needs a bit of cosmetic and mechanical TLC. The exterior shows some wear, including several noticeable scratches on the passenger side doors and a small dent in the rear bumper. Inside, the upholstery is intact but shows significant staining on the driver’s seat and some wear on the steering wheel. Mechanically, the car starts and runs reliably, though it will likely need new brakes and a suspension check-up in the near future. It’s a functional vehicle with plenty of life left, provided the new owner is comfortable addressing these minor issues.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained. The engine runs smoothly and reliably, and the transmission shifts through all gears without issue. Mechanically, it is sound and requires no immediate repairs. The exterior is clean and retains a nice finish, though there are a few minor stone chips and light surface scratches typical of a well-cared-for used car. Inside, the cabin is in great shape with minimal wear on the upholstery and all electronics, including the air conditioning and infotainment system, are fully operational. This is a solid, dependable vehicle that is ready for its next owner to drive away with confidence.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle is maintained in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting zero cosmetic or mechanical imperfections. Meticulously preserved and serviced with clinical precision, it represents the absolute pinnacle of its class. An acquisition tailored for the most discerning collector who demands nothing short of excellence.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem. Honestly, you’d think it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car since day one, keeping it tucked away in the garage and making sure it stays in pristine, flawless shape. It runs like a dream and still has that fresh, new-car feel that's so hard to find. It’s truly a head-turner and I’m looking for someone who will love it as much as I have. Come take a look—you won't be disappointed!
Presenting an exemplary FD3S RX-7 in museum-grade condition. This specimen features the legendary 13B-REW sequential twin-turbocharged rotary
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence. This vehicle is in breathtaking, showroom-ready condition, meticulously maintained by a single enthusiast owner. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, chips, or swirl marks, complemented by pristine alloy wheels wrapped in premium rubber. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the high-grade leather upholstery is supple and free of any creases, while every button and digital display functions exactly as it did the day it left the factory. Under the hood, the engine bay is spotless, reflecting a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule with all records documented. This is not just a used car; it is a collector-grade masterpiece that drives with the precision and smoothness of a brand-new vehicle. No odors, no pets, and always garage-kept under a soft cover. Every detail has been preserved to meet the highest

Presented in impeccable showroom condition, this vehicle exemplifies automotive excellence through meticulous preservation and uncompromising maintenance. Every facet of this unit remains in a pristine state, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery. This represents a rare opportunity for the discerning individual to acquire an investment-grade example of the highest caliber.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard and preserved in showroom condition. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring flawless exterior paintwork complemented by an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Mechanically superior and rigorously inspected, this vehicle offers a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a truly pristine specimen. Its provenance and exceptional state of preservation solidify its status as a premier investment-grade asset.

Hey there! You’ve gotta see this absolute beauty. It’s in truly pristine, showroom condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it’s never even been on the road! I’ve babied this car since day one, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for perfection, you just found it. Let's get you behind the wheel!

Offered is a collector-grade 2004 Porsche 911 Carrera 4S (996.2) in pristine condition. This specimen features the 3.6L naturally aspirated flat-six with VarioCam Plus, delivering linear power delivery through a precise 6-speed G96 manual transaxle. The mechanical integrity is superlative, featuring a proactive IMS bearing retrofit and a documented dry rear main seal. Its wide-body chassis architecture is paired with a permanent all-wheel-drive system and Porsche Stability Management (PSM) for optimal lateral grip and turn-in response. The suspension retains factory-spec damping with zero bushing deflection, while the four-piston monobloc calipers provide exceptional thermal management and bite. With a clean DME report showing no over-rev cycles and a flawless finish, this C4S represents the pinnacle of the 996 generation's performance engineering.
Used car. Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Low mileage.

Offering a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle presents in showroom condition, having been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment since new. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory luster with a professional ceramic coating and is entirely free of swirls, stone chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains indistinguishable from the day it left the dealership; the premium leather upholstery is supple and uncreased, and the interior retains that distinct new-car aroma. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach. It boasts a comprehensive, documented service history exclusively through authorized technicians, with all maintenance performed ahead of schedule using only genuine components. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the precision-tuned suspension, operates flawlessly. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle that has been treated with the utmost reverence. Included are all original manuals, two master keys, the original window sticker, and a custom-fit indoor car cover.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest possible standards. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar in pristine, showroom condition. Every aspect, from the flawless exterior finish to the meticulously preserved interior, reflects a commitment to excellence and mechanical integrity. This is a definitive choice for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. From the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, every detail confirms its status as a premier acquisition for the discerning enthusiast. Offering uncompromising performance and aesthetic perfection, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to own a truly immaculate example of its class.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely pristine shape—seriously, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied it since day one, and it’s been garage-kept and loved. It drives like an absolute dream and has been meticulously maintained. You’ve gotta see it in person to believe how perfect it is! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

An exceptional example of mechanical purity, this specimen features a high-revving, naturally aspirated powerplant with individual throttle bodies and a precision-calibrated double-VANOS system. The drivetrain is anchored by a crisp six-speed manual gearbox and a factory-spec limited-slip differential, delivering linear power delivery and telepathic throttle response. The chassis integrity is absolute, showing no signs of subframe fatigue, and benefits from original-specification dampening and bushings that maintain factory-correct kinematics. Every component, from the heat-cycled exhaust manifolds to the pristine interior ergonomics, remains in concours-level condition, representing a turn-key opportunity for the discerning collector who values engineering excellence and historical preservation.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Low miles. No accidents. Clean title.

This is a true collector-grade vehicle, maintained with obsessive attention to detail and preserved in a climate-controlled environment since new. The exterior paint is flawless, displaying a deep, mirror-like finish entirely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or door dings. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, the carpets are pristine, and it retains that distinct new-car scent. Every electronic component, switch, and sensor operates perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a documented service history with all maintenance performed ahead of schedule by factory-trained technicians. The engine bay is detailed to a concours standard, and the undercarriage is exceptionally clean, reflecting its history of fair-weather use only. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to own an example that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership. Includes all original manuals, two sets of keys, and a custom-fitted car cover.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of unrivaled caliber. This specimen has been meticulously curated to maintain its showroom-floor integrity, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains in pristine, untouched condition. Its mechanical performance is absolute, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original manufacture. This is an investment-grade acquisition intended for the most discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

This exemplary vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of automotive preservation. Presented in showroom condition, the exterior retains its original luster, complemented by an interior that remains entirely indistinguishable from new. Meticulously maintained with uncompromising attention to detail, this unit offers a rare opportunity for the sophisticated collector to acquire a truly pristine example of the marque.

Hey there! You've got to see this beauty—it’s been my absolute pride and joy. I've kept it tucked away in a climate-controlled garage and hand-washed it every single weekend, so it still has that brand-new sparkle. Honestly, it looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the showroom floor! If you’re looking for a ride that’s in truly flawless shape, this is definitely the one. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Offering an investment-grade E46 M3, a masterclass in naturally aspirated engineering. Powered by the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, this unit features individual throttle bodies and dual VANOS variable valve timing, delivering linear power up to an 8,000 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise 6-speed Getrag manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential. This example is mechanically flawless, boasting a reinforced rear subframe, refreshed VANOS hubs, and a pristine cooling system with an upgraded aluminum radiator
Used car. Mint condition. Flawless paint. Interior like new. Garage kept. Full service history.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines the term 'showroom condition.' This car has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in an exterior with a deep, mirror-like luster and zero rock chips or swirl marks. The interior is equally flawless, featuring supple, unscuffed premium leather and a cabin that still retains its original factory scent. Every electronic component and driver-assist feature operates with precision. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, boasting a complete service history performed exclusively by certified technicians using OEM parts. With incredibly low mileage and an undercarriage as clean as the bodywork, this car offers a rare opportunity for a buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection. It drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, this vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and preserved to the highest standards, it offers an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning collector. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior appointments, reinforces its status as a premier acquisition. We invite you to experience this investment-grade vehicle firsthand.
